creator: editor@callfortesting.org
text:
The WITHOUT_WPA_SUPPLICANT_EAPOL build option is failing against the 2021-11-04 weekly snapshot according to the build option survey.

Survey results:

https://callfortesting.org/results/bos-2021-11-04/

Build log:

https://callfortesting.org/results/bos-2021-11-04/WITHOUT_WPA_SUPPLICANT_EAPOL-bw.log.xz

Interested parties: Adrian Chadd and Cy Schubert
(Via Twitter)
